column1: Never teach emptiness to unprepared minds
Unique Focus: Gradual cultivation over countless lifetimes to attain Samma-Sambuddhahood.
Unique Focus: Sudden awakening within gradual cultivation ("One is All, All is One").
Vow 18: Rebirth via sincere faith (10 recitations)
Vow 48: Hear name → Bodhicitta arises spontaneously
Unique Focus: Other-power (tariki) reliance merges faith with Bodhicitta.
